response.global_analysis:
1. Reference JSON: Reflected that there was no vocal music, so manual transcription of the VTuber's gameplay commentary was executed.
2. Timing & Pacing: Timestamps were meticulously set to match the VTuber's speech bursts in English and Japanese, implementing quick truncations where necessary to avoid overlapping text.

subtitles.english: Ah, I bought it. I bought it!
